assertionResults.reason: Dashboard shows Executive/Leads/Workers as horizontal columns with 1px right borders between columns.
Metrics strip exists below top bar with 5 near-equal width cells (1px spread); labels are 9px uppercase dim and values are 15px weight 500.
Top bar is single-row (36px); logo text is uppercase 12px bold with darker rose background; tabs are present in the same row.
Bottom command bar is docked (38px), includes EXEC prefix, transparent command input, and RUN button.
Only one idle agent is present (0 active, 0 waiting), so status-order sorting (active/running -> waiting -> idle/completed) cannot be validated.
Idle agent collapse/expand behavior was observed, but there are no active agents to verify the required expanded active-agent stream section.
No stream transcript content (reasoning/tool call/tool result/error lines) is present in the expanded dashboard agent block, so color-coding checks cannot be performed.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned no entries on this run.
frictions.resolution: Used screenshots plus DOM/computed-style evidence as primary validation artifacts.

blockers.description: Dashboard test data contains only one idle agent and no active/waiting agents or stream transcript lines.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Expanded the idle agent card via click to check for additional metadata/stream content, but no active or stream data appeared.

appliedUpdates: Captured dashboard screenshots and DOM/computed-style audits for VAL-GUI-DASH-001..004.
Expanded idle Executive-tier agent row (read-only click) to validate collapse/expand behavior evidence.
Recorded console and network diagnostics artifacts.
summary: Validated 7 dashboard assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked due to missing active/waiting/stream data in the current local dataset.
